members.label: ceiling light
members.long_form_open_description: Multiple hanging pendant lights or recessed fixtures are visible in the kitchen ceiling above the island, providing focused lighting over the island surface. Appear as small bright spots in the ceiling area.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Directly above the kitchen island; aligned with island's length
